{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323040310FB34FE037E5E142F98E7"}"},"total":578},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7492651023298659134","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"觉的还可以。不知道为什么分不高。文笔还可以。开始以为是签到召唤流了。但是看看不是。本人喜欢看些武侠召唤流些。但是看看觉的文笔也可以。就看下去了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744526497,"group_id":"7382784145992207385","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+XQvC3GuLMxxNCU/hjzg2M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"50508488514","user_name":"书虫看书中"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50508488514","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382784145992207385","book_info":{"abstract":"夏默穿越武侠世界，成为大夏王朝四皇子。
可先天经脉堵塞无法习武。
本以为这一辈子只能庸庸碌碌的当一个富贵皇子。
没想到在十八岁觉醒了神级签到系统。
开局奖励满级嫁衣神功。
每到一个地方签到，都会奖励一门满级武功。
大夏历一百八十年。
太子殿下在北境死于武道大宗师之手。
翌日，一道旨意从皇宫而出，传遍整个天下。
兹有皇四子夏默，才兼文武，智略非凡，故特封为镇武司司主，统领大夏江湖事。
